settings notifications and data rights stay in drill-in panels

seeker more actions open their launch destinations

opens signed-in campus CV manager with backend CVs

owners.surface: Seeker and campus AI career tools plus job-detail AI buttons

mustContain: seeker and campus AI career tool buttons call every backend feature
job detail AI buttons call match and cover-letter tools
ai-tool-career_copilot
job-ai-match

owners.surface: Campus mode home, opportunities, events, applications, verification, and profile

mustContain: campus main tabs keep the locked header and five bottom tabs
campus card detail and filter routes keep the locked follow-up chrome
campus more actions open their launch destinations
campus CV profile checkpoint opens the same CV manager

owners.surface: Company dashboard, jobs, applicants, talent, More tools, profile, billing, and settings

mustContain: company main tabs keep the locked header and five bottom tabs
company More module cards open their workflow screens
company AI hiring tools are grouped under More when enabled
company job screen manages live job actions
company applicant screen updates status, notes, and rating
company talent screens search and manage help requests

owners.surface: University dashboard, students, verifications, partners, opportunities, reports, and profile/settings

mustContain: university main tabs keep the locked header and five bottom tabs
university profile settings notifications and details keep follow-up chrome
help article rows open the full article detail screen
support inbox opens detail, replies, and closes the ticket
privacy service uses list, create, cancel, and accessibility endpoints
